complaints.Title: Infusion pump occlusion alarm delayed activation
complaints.Investigation Summary: Returned device confirmed occlusion-sensor firmware threshold caused delayed alarm under low-flow conditions. Reportable per 21 CFR 803; MDR filed within 30 days.
complaints.Description: Field complaint from clinical user: occlusion alarm activated later than specified at low infusion rates.

risks.Title: Delayed occlusion alarm under low-flow infusion
risks.Hazardous Situation: Occlusion not annunciated within specified time at <5 mL/h flow
risks.Cause: Alarm threshold insensitive at low flow
risks.Control: Firmware update lowering low-flow occlusion threshold; verification testing across flow range
risks.Description: Post-production signal from complaint CMP-0001 reassessed in product risk file per ISO 14971.

capas.Title: Correct low-flow occlusion alarm threshold (Infusion Systems)
capas.Root Cause Summary: Occlusion-detection threshold validated only at nominal flow; low-flow regime not covered in original V&V.
capas.Root Causes: 1) Requirement gap: low-flow occlusion timing not specified. 2) Verification gap: test matrix omitted <5 mL/h flows.
capas.Effectiveness Criteria: Zero recurrence of delayed-alarm complaints for 90 days post-deployment AND passing field-data trend review.
capas.Description: Root-cause-driven correction of occlusion alarm logic with verification, document/firmware change, training and effectiveness check.

capas.Title: Correct traceability gap in dhr
capas.Root Cause Summary: Design tolerance stack-up under worst case.
capas.Effectiveness Criteria: No recurrence over defined monitoring window + metric within target

capas.Title: Prevent recurrence of particulate observed in fill line
capas.Root Cause Summary: Insufficient operator training on revised procedure.
capas.Effectiveness Criteria: No recurrence over defined monitoring window + metric within target

capas.Title: Eliminate supplier lot certificate mismatch
capas.Effectiveness Criteria: No recurrence over defined monitoring window + metric within target

change-requests.Title: Firmware v4.2 — low-flow occlusion threshold + SOP-INF-014 rev
change-requests.Impact Assessment: Affects all Infusion Systems Class II products in production; requires V&V, DHF update and operator retraining.

mgmt-reviews.Title: Q1 2026 Management Review — Plymouth & Global QMS
mgmt-reviews.Complaint Trend: Infusion occlusion signal closed via CAPA-0001 (effectiveness Passed)
mgmt-reviews.Supplier Performance: 2 critical suppliers below target; SCARs open
mgmt-reviews.Inputs Summary: Complaint CMP-0001 → CAPA-0001 → CHG-0001 closed with effectiveness Passed; residual risk RSK-0001 reduced to Low. Reviewed audit results, supplier performance, training compliance and open quality records.
mgmt-reviews.Actions: Approve closure of CAPA-0001; monitor Infusion occlusion trend a further 90 days; escalate critical-supplier SCARs.

mgmt-reviews.Title: 2025 Q2 Management Review — Global QMS
mgmt-reviews.Inputs Summary: Reviewed audit results, complaints, CAPA performance, supplier performance, process metrics, regulatory changes, risks and prior actions.
mgmt-reviews.Actions: Resource adjustments and continued monitoring of open quality signals.

mgmt-reviews.Title: 2025 Q3 Management Review — Global QMS
mgmt-reviews.Inputs Summary: Reviewed audit results, complaints, CAPA performance, supplier performance, process metrics, regulatory changes, risks and prior actions.
